_forge_note: FORGE Authority Constitution managed-settings template (Spec 469, NC-2 slice 2; push gate added Spec 498). This is a TEMPLATE: an admin/operator installs it (or merges it) at the OS managed-settings path documented in docs/process-kit/authority-constitution-guide.md. Once installed via SERVER-MANAGED settings (Claude.ai admin console — the only documented cross-surface CLI+extension enforcement; the per-user file path is non-viable per the 469-Open-Q2 research), it is the agent-IMMUTABLE trust root that enforces the ADR-046 no-self-escalation invariant AND the Spec 498 git-push gate (the registered check-push-guard.sh cannot be removed and disableBypassPermissionsMode keeps the push permission prompt unbypassable at L3/L4). Until installed, the repo is at the hooks-only tier (bypassable at L3) and deferred-close chaining stays L1/L2-gated (Spec 498 §6.1 'designed, not enforced'). Verified against Claude Code managed-settings docs 2026-06-15: macOS /Library/Application Support/ClaudeCode/managed-settings.json, Linux /etc/claude-code/managed-settings.json, Windows C:\Program Files\ClaudeCode\managed-settings.json.
